seoTitle: Framlingham vs Framlingham East — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Framlingham and Framlingham East. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Framlingham vs Framlingham East: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Framlingham and Framlingham East.
heading: Framlingham vs Framlingham East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Framlingham, Victoria and Framlingham East, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Framlingham and Framlingham East have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Framlingham or Framlingham East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Framlingham has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Framlingham East scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Framlingham scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Framlingham East scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Framlingham or Framlingham East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Framlingham has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
